events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The 4-gas monitor shows O2 20.9%, LEL 1%, and CO 8 ppm all within acceptable limits, but the H2S channel displays "--" instead of a numeric reading — indicating a sensor fault or incomplete test rather than a confirmed safe result. Since a permit-required confined space entry requires a valid reading on all four parameters, I marked this as `fail` (entry cannot be authorized until the H2S sensor issue is resolved and a complete re-test is documented). Written to `/app/answer.json`.
